steps.t: Hórin is standing by with the dwarf forces. You should talk to Hórin.
You have tracked the hobgoblins to the end of the road. You should follow Hórin and find the hobgoblins.
You have tracked the hobgoblins to the end of the road. You should follow Hórin and find the hobgoblins.
You have found Gorgar at the end of the road. He must be the hobgoblins' reason for coming here! You should watch and listen as events unfold!
The hobgoblins will soon be upon you! You should return to the Gate of Uzdarulzahar and summon your forces!
The hobgoblins will soon be upon you! You should blow the horn to summon your forces!
The hobgoblins will soon be upon you! You should wait for your forces to arrive!
